title: Aurora, 99220, Palm Pals Holly Christmas Stocking, 5In, Soft Toy, Red & White
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable Holly Christmas Stocking soft toy made with high quality materials
Collectible beanie soft toy which fits in the palm of your hand
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: This cute Holly Christmas Stocking fits into the palm of your hand, full of beans which makes for a super soft and cuddly soft toy. With a soft red plush material body. This is a super cute playful Holly Stocking soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Holly Stocking. Holly Stocking is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
